hero.tagline: When Disaster Hits, We Step Up to the Plate
hero.subtitle: Professional water damage mitigation and mold remediation serving Southern California. We take the hassle out of your hands.

about.text:
Major League Response is Southern California's premier water damage, mold remediation, and disaster recovery experts. We believe in providing championship-level service when you need it most. Our certified technicians are on standby 24/7 to step up to the plate and restore your property.

When water damage strikes or mold infests your home, you shouldn't have to deal with amateur contractors. We step up to the plate with heavy-duty equipment, precise moisture mapping, and complete build-back services entirely handled in-house.

items.name: Water Mitigation
items.description: Industrial water extraction, structural drying, and dehumidification. We solve leaks and floods fast.

items.name: Mold Remediation
items.description: Safe containment, aggressive removal, and air scrubbing to ensure your home is breathable.

items.name: Fire Damage
items.description: Soot removal, smoke odor elimination, and surface restoration after devastating fires.

items.name: Build Back
items.description: Full reconstruction services. Put the tear-out back together with our licensed contractors.

items.name: Pack Out Services
items.description: Safe inventory, packing, and climate-controlled storage of your belongings during the restoration process.

steps.title: Inspection
steps.description: We arrive rapidly, assess the damage, map moisture levels, and give you a clear, honest evaluation.

steps.title: Mitigation
steps.description: Heavy duty extraction, tear-out of unsalvageable material, mold abatement, and industrial drying.

steps.title: Restoration
steps.description: Rebuilding your property to pre-loss conditions while we handle the direct billing with insurance.

insuranceSection.text: Dealing with property damage is stressful enough without fighting adjusters. As a Major League team, we handle the entire claim for you so you can focus on your life.

items.title: Emergency Extraction
items.description: Rapid water removal and industrial drying.

items.title: Total Reconstruction
items.description: Restored to better than pre-loss conditions.

items.name: Sarah T., Irvine
items.quote: They arrived within 45 minutes of my frantic call. A pipe burst in the kitchen and flooded into the living room, but their crew extracted the water and set up drying equipment so fast that our hardwood floors were saved. Highly recommend their professionalism.

items.name: Mark D., Santa Clarita
items.quote: Dealt with a difficult mold issue in our attic that another company failed to fully clear. Major League Response handled the abatement clean and quick, and their communication throughout the insurance process was phenomenal.

items.name: Jessica L., Orange County
items.quote: After a small kitchen fire, the smoke damage was overwhelming. The team cleaned, deodorized, and completely rebuilt the damaged cabinets. It looks better now than it did before the incident.

items.question: How quickly can you arrive?
items.answer: We pride ourselves on our 60-minute rapid response. When water damage occurs, time is of the essence, so we always have a crew on standby ready to deploy across Southern California.

items.question: Will you work directly with my insurance company?
items.answer: Yes. We handle the entire claim process and bill your insurance directly. We provide all the necessary moisture logs, photos, and documentation so you don't have to fight the adjusters.

items.question: Is mold remediation safe for my family and pets?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use professional-grade containment barriers and HEPA air scrubbers to isolate the affected area, ensuring that mold spores do not spread to the rest of the house during the removal process.

footerSection.description: Premium water mitigation and mold remediation services. We play in the Major Leagues so you don't have to worry.
